payload.description:
## Summary
Apply one RCA contract across all feedback-backed evaluation paths.

## Deliverables
- Use the same RCA behavior in `FeedbackEvaluation` and the accuracy-with-feedback-dataset path.
- Remove split-brain behavior between the two code paths.
- Keep one correct RCA implementation path rather than parallel variants.
payload.title: Unify RCA behavior across all feedback-backed evaluation paths
